title: ASR Outdoor 14" Inch Black Riffled Gold Panning Pan for Mining Prospecting
description:
An essential piece of prospecting equipment is the Gold Pan. The Professional Gold Pan features riffles for fast and effective panning. When you add water, dirt, and gravel to your pan the lighter material flows out and the wide textured bottom allows for efficient separation highlighting the fine gold in the bottom of your pan. It is light weight yet very tough so your arms won't get as tired compared to using a steel pan. It's good to have a couple different sizes of gold pans on hand (10 inch, 12 inch, and 14 inch are the most popular). Plastic pans generally come in green, black, and blue. This top-quality gold getter and will hold up to years of prospecting which can also be used for prospecting and testing other deposits of heavy minerals.

It is light weight yet very tough so your arms won't get as tired compared to using a steel pan.

Key Features

  • Riffled Traps to Collect Minerals

  • Color: Black
  • Diameter: 14"
  • Depth: 2"

Product Specifications

  • UPC: 712046971090
  • Color: Black
  • Size: 14 in
